name: Okta: Org Trust Relationships
description: Lists all org-to-org trust relationships including inbound and outbound SSO federation, Secure Web Authentication (SWA), and Kerberos SSO relationships between Okta applications and supported external organizations or tenants.
query:
MATCH path = (source)-[:Okta_InboundOrgSSO|Okta_OutboundOrgSSO|Okta_OrgSWA|Okta_KerberosSSO]-()
WHERE source:Okta_Application OR source:Okta_IdentityProvider
RETURN path
LIMIT 1000
